sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: geonames-sy.zip
rawFiles.notes: GeoNames Syria country dump cached under data-automation outputs.

rawFiles.name: ../data-geography/data/localities.json
rawFiles.notes: Used only for reviewed administrative locality links copied through existing canonical maritime records.

transforms: Accepted held GeoNames WHRF and PIER feature rows as public maritime terminal subfacilities after review.
Used terminal location type rather than seaport to avoid duplicating main port identities.
Copied administrative location links from reviewed nearby OpenSyria geography-backed maritime records.
Kept operational status unknown because GeoNames feature presence does not provide live status.
reviewNotes: Imported 6 public maritime terminal subfacility records from held GeoNames WHRF/PIER rows. Tartus, Latakia, and Arwad-area subfacilities were added as terminal records; main seaport identities were left unchanged. A follow-up label repair restored Arabic names and diacritic transliteration aliases from GeoNames alternatenames after corrupted question-mark placeholders were found in the canonical JSON.
